products.title: Women's Day Gift Box
products.description:
Celebrate Women’s Day with our thoughtfully curated pack of 5 hampers, each containing a mini flower hair clip, a jhumka earring (design may vary), and a satin scrunchie. Perfect for gifting to friends, colleagues, or loved ones.

Color Variants: Pink, Yellow, Blue, Orange, Lavender
Important: MOQ is 5. Please specify your preferred colors in the order notes; we will send the hampers according to your selection.

Highlights:

  • Ready-to-gift accessory set

  • Stylish and versatile

  • Ideal for bulk gifting and Women’s Day celebrations
